messages.content: Draft a message to a recruiter on linkedin for a business development role at Neom

Subject: Excited to explore a business development opportunity at NEOM

Dear [Recruiter's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I came across your profile while researching job opportunities at NEOM and saw that you are the Talent Acquisition Specialist there. As a passionate business development professional with a strong interest in the innovative and sustainable city projects, I am intrigued by NEOM's vision, and I am eager to explore any potential opportunity to join the team in a business development role.

With over [number of years] years of experience in the [your industry] industry, I have built a proven track record of generating significant revenue growth, fostering strategic partnerships, and navigating complex negotiations. My background in market research and competitive analysis has enabled me to identify untapped opportunities for expansion and provided valuable insights that have driven successful initiatives.

I am particularly drawn to the global scope and ambitious plans that NEOM is undertaking to create not just a new city but an inspiring model of sustainable living for the world. I am confident that my skills in communication, relationship building, and strategic planning, combined with my passion for the mission, make me a great fit for helping NEOM achieve continued growth and success.

I would be grateful for the opportunity to discuss further how my experience and skills can contribute to the Business Development team at NEOM. If there is a suitable role available or in the pipeline, I would love to share more about my background and discuss how my expertise aligns with NEOM's objectives.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you and exploring opportunities to contribute to NEOM's groundbreaking mission.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
write a message to the founder of silkhaus seeking job oppurtunities

Subject: Keen to contribute and explore career opportunities at Silkhaus

Dear [Founder's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I came across Silkhaus through [source, e.g., blog post, social media, etc.] and was instantly captivated by your innovative approach to creating sustainable, luxurious, and ethically sourced silk products. As an aspiring professional looking to contribute my skill set to a purpose-driven organization, I wanted to extend my admiration for the work you are doing and express my interest in exploring potential job opportunities at Silkhaus.

Having [briefly mention your relevant experience or area of expertise, e.g., studied sustainable fashion, worked in operations for an e-commerce retailer], I have gained valuable skills and knowledge that I believe could prove valuable in contributing to Silkhaus's growth and expansion. Furthermore, my passion for eco-conscious consumer goods, coupled with my experience [mention a specific accomplishment or related responsibility], makes me confident that I could make a positive impact on your team and organization.

I understand that finding the right fit is crucial for a growing company like Silkhaus, and I would appreciate the opportunity to further discuss how my background and skills align with your current needs. If there are any available positions or up-coming projects that you feel I could potentially be a good fit for, I would be thrilled to connect and learn more about them.

I have attached my resume for your reference and would welcome the chance to provide any additional information you may require. You can also review my experience and recommendations on my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL].

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you and contributing to Silkhaus's mission of providing sustainable, luxurious, and ethically sourced textiles to the world.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
write a message to the founder of sonder seeking job opportunities

Subject: Eager to contribute and explore job opportunities at Sonder

Dear [Founder's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I recently became aware of Sonder through [source, e.g., a news article, social media post, etc.] and was immediately impressed by your unique approach to revolutionizing the hospitality industry with a blend of technology, design, and exceptional service. As a forward-thinking professional with a passion for transforming the way people experience travel, I am eager to explore potential job opportunities at Sonder and contribute my skills and experience to your innovative organization.

With a background in [mention your relevant experience or area of expertise, e.g., operations management, marketing, or customer service], I have gained insights into various aspects of the hospitality sector and developed a diverse skill set that I believe would add value to the Sonder team. My experience in [mention a specific accomplishment, responsibility, or project], coupled with my relentless drive to create outstanding experiences, has equipped me to make a significant impact on your organization's growth and expansion.

I understand that finding the perfect fit is essential for a rapidly evolving company like Sonder, and I would be grateful for the opportunity to further discuss how my background and skills align with your current needs. If there are any available positions or upcoming projects that you feel I might be well-suited for, I would be excited to connect and learn more about them.

I have attached my resume for your reference and am also available for a conversation at your earliest convenience. You can review my experience and recommendations on my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL]. Please feel free to reach out [mention preferred method and contact details].

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you and contributing to Sonder's mission of reshaping the future of hospitality.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

write a message to the founder of airbnb seeking job opportunities

Subject: Enthusiastic to explore job opportunities and contribute to Airbnb's success

Dear [Founder's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I have long been an admirer of Airbnb's groundbreaking presence in the hospitality industry, showcasing the power of community-driven experiences. As an ambitious professional passionate about creating positive change and memorable encounters, I am eager to explore potential job opportunities at Airbnb and contribute my skills and experience to further Airbnb's mission.

With a background in [mention your relevant experience or area of expertise, e.g., operations management, marketing, or customer service], I have developed a diverse skill set, which includes [list some specific skills relevant to Airbnb's core values and operations]. My experience in [mention a specific accomplishment, responsibility, or project] has prepared me to make a significant impact within an innovative organization such as Airbnb.

I recognize the importance of finding the right fit for a company that values creative problem-solving and bold ideas. Therefore, I would appreciate the opportunity to further discuss how my background and skills align with Airbnb's current needs and requirements. If there are any available positions or up-coming projects you feel I might be well-suited for, I would be delighted to connect and learn more about them.

Please find my resume attached for your review. You can also take a look at my LinkedIn profile to explore my experience and recommendations [insert profile URL]. I would be glad to discuss my background in more detail and provide any additional information required.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you and contributing to Airbnb's ongoing commitment to creating a world where anyone can belong anywhere.

Kind regards,

[Your Full Name]

Draft a message to a recruiter on linkedin for a business development role at PIF

Subject: Passionate about exploring a business development role at PIF

Dear [Recruiter's Name],

I hope you are doing well. During my recent search for exciting career opportunities, I came across the Public Investment Fund (PIF) and was highly impressed by your organization's strategic vision and commitment to sustainable growth and economic diversification in Saudi Arabia. As an experienced business development professional with a strong background in driving business growth and creating strategic partnerships, I am eager to explore suitable opportunities to join the PIF team in a business development role.

With over [number of years] years of experience and a history of success in the [your industry] industry, I have honed my skills in sales strategy, market research, and relationship building. My ability to generate significant revenue growth, foster key partnerships, and navigate complex negotiations has consistently resulted in strong outcomes for the organizations I have worked with. I am confident that my diverse skill set and passion for continuous improvement will enable me to contribute effectively to PIF's ambitious goals.

I believe that my experience and dedication to delivering results align well with PIF's mission to support the national economy and unlock new sectors through strategic and impactful investments. I would be grateful for the chance to discuss my background further and learn more about any available business development roles within PIF.

If you find that my experience aligns with PIF's current openings or upcoming requirements, I would be delighted to connect and chat further. Feel free to review my resume and recommendations on my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL], and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or need additional information.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the prospects of connecting with you and potentially becoming part of PIF's dynamic team.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
write a message to a ex colleague from OYO seeking job opportunities at PIF

Subject: Reconnecting and exploring career opportunities at PIF

Hi [Ex Colleague's Name],

I hope you've been keeping well since our time at OYO. It's been a while since we last connected, and I wanted to reach out and share some exciting updates with you. Recently, I've been researching the Public Investment Fund (PIF) and have grown increasingly interested in their mission to support Saudi Arabia's national economy and unlock new sectors through strategic investments. As you may recall, my background in business development aligns well with the objectives of funds like PIF.

Given your experience and connections in the industry, I wanted to ask if you might know of any job opportunities at PIF that could be a good fit for my skills and expertise. As you've witnessed during our time at OYO, I have a proven track record in generating revenue growth, fostering strategic partnerships, and leading teams to achieve ambitious targets. I believe my experience in the [your industry] sector and passion for sustainable development would make me a strong candidate for a role within PIF.

If you could share any information or introduce me to someone within PIF or the broader investment landscape, I would be immensely grateful for your assistance and support. I have attached my resume for your review, and you can also check out my updated LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL] to learn more about my recent accomplishments.

I hope you've been thriving since our time at OYO, and I look forward to catching up. If you have any news to share or simply want to reconnect, please feel free to reach out. Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and I anticipate your valuable response.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
write a message to a ex colleague from OYO  congratulating them for moving to the PIF and if they could help with job opportunities at PIF

Subject: Congratulations on your move to PIF - Exploring opportunities

Hi [Ex Colleague's Name],

I hope you're doing well and enjoying your time since we last worked together at OYO. Recently, I came across the news of your new role at the Public Investment Fund (PIF), and I wanted to reach out to personally congratulate you on this fantastic career move! Knowing your dedication and expertise, I have no doubt that you'll make a significant impact at PIF.

Over the past months, I've been researching PIF's mission to support Saudi Arabia's national economy and unlock new sectors through strategic investments, which has piqued my interest. Given your insider's perspective and our shared experience at OYO, I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions you may have for someone like me seeking an opportunity at PIF. My background in business development, as you may recall, has allowed me to develop expertise in revenue growth, strategic partnerships, and team leadership, all of which I believe strongly align with PIF's objectives.

If you happen to know of any openings that could be a good fit or have any general insights or advice on the hiring process, I would be very grateful for your input. Additionally, if you think it's appropriate, I would appreciate it if you could introduce me to someone within the organization that may be helpful for my job search. I have attached my resume for your reference, and you can also find an updated snapshot of my experience and accomplishments on my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL].

Once again, congratulations on your well-deserved role at PIF! Thank you for taking the time to read my message, and I genuinely appreciate your support. I look forward to hearing from you, and I hope we can catch up soon!

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
follow up email to recruiter at agoda regarding business development role

Subject: Following up on Business Development Role at Agoda

Dear [Recruiter's Name],

I hope you have been having a great week so far. I wanted to follow up on my application for the Business Development role at Agoda, which I submitted on [date]. I am still very interested in the position, and I believe that my experience and skillset make me a strong candidate.

As a reminder, I have [number of years] years of experience in the [your industry] industry, specifically working on revenue growth, strategic partnerships, and competitive analysis. In my previous role at [your former company name], I [mention a specific accomplishment that showcases your expertise in business development]. I am confident that my proven track record and passion for delivering results would make me a valuable asset to Agoda's business development team.

If you require any additional information to support my application, recommendations, or references, please let me know as I am happy to provide them. Alternatively, you can take a look at my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL], where you can find more details about my professional experience and qualifications.

Thank you once again for considering my application. I am eager to learn more about Agoda's dynamic team and hope to have the opportunity to discuss how my background could contribute to the company's ongoing success. I look forward to hearing from you soon regarding the status of my application or the next steps in the hiring process.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
how to guilt you ex manager to hiring you back

I would advise against using guilt as a tactic to rejoin a former company, as it may not create a healthy working environment or a positive relationship with your ex-manager. Instead, consider emphasizing your accomplishments, skills, and how you could contribute to the company's success. Below is a message that focuses on these elements and contains a more positive and professional approach.

Subject: Reconnecting and exploring opportunities to rejoin [Company Name]

Hi [Ex-Manager's Name],

I hope you're doing well and that things at [Company Name] are thriving. It's been some time since we last connected, and I wanted to reach out to share updates and rekindle our professional relationship.

Reflecting on my experience at [Company Name], I remember the numerous ways in which I grew professionally and contributed to the success of our team. During my tenure, I acquired valuable skills such as [mention specific skills/experiences] which continue to benefit me in my professional endeavors. On a personal note, working with you as a manager had a significant and positive impact on my career development. I genuinely appreciated the guidance and mentorship you provided during my time at the company.

Recently, I have been exploring the possibility of returning to [Company Name] and contributing my improved skill set to its ongoing success. After gaining [mention your experiences/achievements since you left the company] in my current role, I am now well-equipped to excel at [mention specific responsibilities/tasks related to your previous position or a new position at the company].

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss any potential openings at [Company Name] that align with my background and expertise. I believe that rejoining the team would be a mutually beneficial decision, and I am eager to reconnect and learn more about current projects and objectives.

Please let me know if you would be open to a meeting or call to further discuss my return to the team. You can find the latest updates on my professional accomplishments and experience on my LinkedIn profile [insert profile URL]. I look forward to the possibility of reconnecting and collaborating once again at [Company Name].

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your LinkedIn Profile URL]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
force HR to settle your long pending final settlement dues email

Subject: Request for Urgent Action on Pending Final Settlement Dues

Dear [HR Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to express my concern regarding the pending final settlement of my dues with [Company Name], following the conclusion of my employment on [last working date]. As per the company's policies and my employment agreement, I was expecting the final settlement to be processed within [number of days] days, but unfortunately, it has been [number of days/months] since my departure, and I have yet to receive any further communication or payment.

I understand that the HR department must handle a broad range of responsibilities, and there might be occasional delays. However, considering the duration that has passed since my exit, I kindly request your urgent attention to this matter, as the unsettled dues are causing me financial difficulties.

Please find below a summary of my pending dues for your reference:

1. Unpaid salary for the period [start date] to [end date]
2. Unused vacation days: [number of unused vacation days]
3. [Any other dues such as bonuses, overtime, or reimbursements]

I kindly request a prompt update on the status of my final settlement, including a clear timeline for when I can expect the payment. In case there are any discrepancies or roadblocks to the settlement process, please let me know so that we can resolve them quickly.

Your immediate attention and action on this matter will be highly appreciated. Thank you for your understanding and assistance in bringing this issue to a resolution.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
force HR to settle your long pending final settlement dues or face legal action email

Subject: Urgent: Pending Final Settlement Dues – Request for Immediate Resolution

Dear [HR Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. As a follow-up to my previous correspondence regarding my pending final settlement dues with [Company Name] after my employment ended on [last working date], I am compelled to express my growing concern over the unresolved issue. As per our employment agreement and the company's policies, I was expecting the settlement to be processed within [number of days] days. However, it has now been [number of days/months] since my departure, and the payment remains unsettled.

I understand that the HR department deals with numerous responsibilities and occasional delays may occur. Nonetheless, the considerable amount of time that has passed since my exit necessitates your urgent attention to this matter. The delay in receiving my rightful dues has caused significant financial challenges and has left me with no other option but to consider legal action if the situation remains unresolved.

Please find below a summary of my pending dues for your reference:

1. Unpaid salary for the period [start date] to [end date]
2. Unused vacation days: [number of unused vacation days]
3. [Any other dues such as bonuses, overtime, or reimbursements]

Given the protracted delay and the impact it has had on me financially, I kindly request your prompt response detailing the status of my final settlement, along with a definitive timeline for the payment. If there are any discrepancies or obstacles delaying the settlement process, I must insist on immediate communication so we can address and resolve them.

In the absence of a satisfactory resolution within the next [number of days, e.g., 10] business days, I will be forced to seek legal assistance and pursue all available legal remedies to ensure the payment of my outstanding dues.

Your immediate attention and cooperation in resolving this matter are essential to avoid legal proceedings and maintain a professional relationship. Thank you for your understanding, and I look forward to receiving your response soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]

[Your Email Address]

[Your Phone Number]
break the ice message on muzzmatch

Subject: The ice-breaking quest begins! 🧊

Salaam [match's name],

I hope you're doing well. As we embark on this journey to break the ice on Muzmatch, let's see if this tiny message is enough to smash through the frosty surface! 😄

I noticed on your profile that you're a fan of [something from their profile, e.g., hiking, reading, or traveling] - that caught my eye, as it's something I'm passionate about as well! I'd love to hear more about your experiences with [specific activity or interest] and any memorable moments or recommendations you might have to offer.

To keep the ball rolling, here's a fun fact about me: [share something interesting about yourself, e.g., a hobby, a travel experience, or a favorite pastime]. I thought that might spark some conversation, and I'm curious to hear a fun fact about you too!

Looking forward to getting to know you better and progressing past the ice-breaking stage to warmer conversations! May our voyage on Muzmatch lead to a meaningful connection, Insha'Allah.

Warm regards,

[Your name]
